scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.start:api: npm run build --workspace @workspace/api-server && npm run start --workspace @workspace/api-server
scripts.start: npm run kill:3000 && npm run start:db && npm run start:api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:libs && npm run typecheck --workspace artifacts/* --workspace scripts --if-present
